nodes.name: KeyValueInputList.tsx
nodes.summary: Reusable form component for editing key-value pair entries (headers). Provides conversion utilities between Record<string,string> and KeyValueEntry[] for use in provider configuration forms.

nodes.name: ModelInputList.tsx
nodes.summary: Reusable form component for editing model entries (name, alias, priority, test model). Used in provider key and OpenAI provider configuration forms.

nodes.name: provider-access.ts
nodes.summary: Analyzes which API key entries can reach a given channel by checking allowed-channels and allowed-channel-groups against channel group definitions.

nodes.name: provider-cache.ts
nodes.summary: Simple localStorage-based cache utility with 7-day TTL for the providers page, providing getCachedData and setCachedData functions.

nodes.name: provider-import-export.ts
nodes.summary: Handles import/export of provider configurations for all provider kinds (Gemini, Claude, Codex, OpenCodeGo, Vertex, Bedrock, OpenAI). Includes normalization with deduplication, diff calculation (added/removed/changed), and serialization for export JSON.

nodes.name: ProviderCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Card UI component for displaying a provider configuration with selection checkbox, enabled/disabled toggle, dropdown action menu (enable/disable, edit, delete), and customizable header/body/footer sections.

nodes.name: ProviderKeyListCard.tsx
nodes.summary: Card that renders a list of provider key configurations using ProviderCard subcomponents. Displays latency, connection info, model chips, excluded models, metric chips, and status bar for each provider entry.

nodes.name: providers-helpers.ts
nodes.summary: Core utility functions for provider configuration management including: disable-all-models rule checking, API key masking, OpenAI base URL normalization, model discovery from API responses, ProviderKeyDraft and OpenAIDraft builders, and statistics aggregation by source.

nodes.name: summarizeProviderAccess
nodes.summary: Determines how many API key entries can reach a specific channel, computing reachableKeys, totalKeys, and exactOverrideKeys counts.

nodes.name: createProviderExportText
nodes.summary: Serializes provider items into a JSON export string with provider kind, version, and normalized/serialized items.

nodes.name: prepareProviderImport
nodes.summary: Parses and validates provider import JSON, normalizes items, computes diff (added/removed/changed) against current items, detects provider kind mismatches.

nodes.name: maskApiKey
nodes.summary: Masks an API key string showing only first/last few characters for display purposes.

nodes.name: normalizeOpenAIBaseUrl
nodes.summary: Normalizes OpenAI base URLs by removing management API path suffixes and ensuring proper protocol prefix.

nodes.name: buildProviderKeyDraft
nodes.summary: Builds a ProviderKeyDraft form state object from a ProviderSimpleConfig or BedrockProviderConfig, converting model and header data to editable entry formats.

nodes.name: buildOpenAIDraft
nodes.summary: Builds an OpenAIDraft form state object from an OpenAIProvider config, converting apiKeyEntries, headers, and models to editable entry formats.

nodes.name: ProvidersPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Thin wrapper page component that delegates rendering to ProvidersPageContent from the components subdirectory.

nodes.name: index.ts (providers)
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting ProvidersPage and providersRoute from the providers page module.

nodes.name: route.tsx (providers)
nodes.summary: Route definition for /ai-providers path with lazy loading, auth requirement, dashboard layout, and nav label.

nodes.name: ProxiesPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Full CRUD page for managing proxy pool entries. Features a DataTable with protocol/endpoint, health check results with latency tones, add/edit modal with form fields, delete confirmation, and cached check results.

nodes.name: index.ts (proxies)
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting ProxiesPage and proxiesRoute.

nodes.name: route.tsx (proxies)
nodes.summary: Route definition for /proxies path with redirect from legacy /manage/proxies path.

nodes.name: ProxiesPage.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test suite for ProxiesPage covering: entry loading and display, health check results caching, add/delete CRUD operations, latency tone rendering, error handling, and refresh behavior.

nodes.name: registry.ts
nodes.summary: Central page route registry that imports all page route definitions (login, dashboard, monitor, request-logs, providers, auth-files, api-keys, api-key-permissions, models, channel-groups, config, logs, system, proxies, identity-fingerprint, image-generation, ccswitch-import-settings, api-key-lookup) and exports them as a single array.

nodes.name: RequestLogsPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Full-featured request logs page with server-side pagination, multi-value filter bar (API keys, models, channels, status), stats display, time range selector, content/error detail modals, and database cleanup dialog.

nodes.name: index.ts (request-logs)
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting RequestLogsPage and requestLogsRoute.

nodes.name: RequestLogsFilters.tsx
nodes.summary: Multi-select filter bar for request logs with SearchableCheckboxMultiSelect components for API keys, models, channels, and status, plus a reset filters button.

nodes.name: route.tsx (request-logs)
nodes.summary: Route definition for /monitor/request-logs path with lazy loading, auth requirement, and dashboard layout.

nodes.name: RequestLogsPage.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Test suite for RequestLogsPage covering: rendering, multi-select filter behavior, clear logs dialog, pagination, stats display, and API integrations.

nodes.name: SystemPage.tsx
nodes.summary: System information page displaying API base URL, management endpoint, server version, build date, UI version, API key lookup URL, Docker update details with update flow (check/apply/progress), and available model list with vendor-colored icons and stats.

nodes.name: index.ts (system)
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting SystemPage and systemRoute.

nodes.name: route.tsx (system)
nodes.summary: Route definition for /system path with lazy loading, auth requirement, and dashboard layout.

nodes.name: SystemPage.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Extensive test suite for SystemPage covering: update check/apply flow, version display, model discovery, release notes rendering with markdown, Docker update progress console, updater availability, and various edge cases.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json (pages)
nodes.summary: TypeScript configuration for the pages workspace with path aliases mapping @code-proxy/* packages, @app/*, @pages/*, @features/*, and @/* to their source directories.

edges.label: exports KeyValueEntry type used by providers-helpers
exports ModelEntryDraft type used by providers-helpers
renders ProviderCard for each provider entry
works with ProviderAccessSummary indirectly via components
caching may be used with provider data
tsconfig paths enable @code-proxy imports used by providers-helpers
